source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
distilled_thesis: The prologue turns matured solitude into a wisdom that can overfill itself and therefore cannot remain closed within private possession.
